title: Aerospace and Defense Industry
gist: This is a BCG aerospace-and-defense practice landing page, not an analytical article—mostly capability marketing and credentials. The genuine signals are a few industry framing points: record A&D demand that companies struggle to convert into output, an aging-fleet/maintenance-backlog/technician-shortage MRO squeeze, and the technology areas reshaping defense competition.

insights.claim: BCG observes that many aerospace and defense companies continue to struggle to convert record demand into reliable production output, with reliability, quality, and schedule performance as the binding constraints.
insights.speaker: BCG Henderson Institute
insights.so_what: Supply-side execution—not demand—is the gating factor for A&D revenue; watch production-ramp and supplier-resilience progress at OEMs.
insights.quote: Many companies across the aerospace and defense industry continue to face challenges converting record demand into reliable production output.

insights.claim: Aircraft operators face mounting pressure from aging fleets, maintenance backlogs, labor constraints, and rising life-cycle costs, driving demand for predictive maintenance and MRO digitization.
insights.speaker: BCG Henderson Institute
insights.so_what: Structural MRO demand and technician scarcity support the aftermarket/MRO-tech investment case in aerospace.
insights.quote: Aircraft operators are facing mounting pressure from aging fleets, maintenance backlogs, labor constraints, and rising life cycle costs.
insights.locator: Maintenance, Repair, and Overhaul of Aircraft

insights.claim: BCG names autonomy, space systems, cybersecurity, unmanned systems, C4ISR, soldier modernization, and directed energy as the priority technologies reshaping competitive dynamics for defense OEMs.
insights.speaker: BCG Henderson Institute
insights.so_what: A checklist of where defense procurement budgets and growth are migrating—useful for screening defense-tech exposure.
insights.quote: priority technologies including unmanned systems, C4ISR, cybersecurity, soldier modernization, space, and directed energy
insights.locator: Strategy and Go to Market for Defense OEMs

insights.claim: BCG notes investor interest in aerospace and defense assets continues to grow as governments expand spending and industrial priorities evolve.
insights.speaker: BCG Henderson Institute
insights.so_what: Confirms rising PE/strategic capital flowing into defense on the back of higher government spending—supportive for sector multiples.
insights.quote: Investor interest in aerospace and defense assets continues to grow as governments expand spending and industrial priorities evolve.
insights.locator: Private Equity and Due Diligence on Defense Assets
